title: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
summary: EU regulation on data protection and privacy for individuals within the European Union. Establishes requirements for processing personal data including consent, data subject rights, security measures, and breach notification.

key_requirements.title: Principles relating to processing of personal data
key_requirements.description: Personal data must be processed lawfully, fairly, transparently, with purpose limitation, data minimization, accuracy, storage limitation, integrity and confidentiality

key_requirements.title: Data protection by design and by default
key_requirements.description: Implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure data protection principles

key_requirements.title: Records of processing activities
key_requirements.description: Maintain records of all personal data processing activities

key_requirements.title: Security of processing
key_requirements.description: Implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure security of personal data

key_requirements.title: Notification of personal data breach
key_requirements.description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breaches within 72 hours

engineering_implications.description: Implement encryption, pseudonymization, and access controls for personal data
Log all access to and processing of personal data
Design data model with data minimization and purpose limitation principles
Implement privacy by design and by default in system architecture

source_references.citation: Regulation (EU) 2016/679 on the protection of natural persons
